title: Rotation overlap window symptom (Auth)
summary: Resolve "rotation overlap window" — symptom for the Auth surface.

content.text:
## Symptom

An operation against the Auth surface fails with an error matching "rotation overlap window (symptom)".

## Resolution

1. Inspect the error envelope.
2. Re-issue with corrected parameters.
3. Confirm via the audit log.

See the [Auth API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get) for the exact field set.
